title: ActivityPub relay support
description: Add support for subscribing to and publishing through ActivityPub relays. Relays are shared inbox/outbox hubs that help small instances get discovered and populate federated timelines. Major relays: relay.fedi.buzz (topic-filtered), relay.beckmeyer.us, relay.intahnet.co.uk, mastodonrelay.com. The relay protocol is standard AP Follow + delivery to a shared inbox.
design: Relay subscription is instance-level (not per-persona). Two directions: (1) Outbound: add relay inbox URLs to delivery fanout for all public posts. (2) Inbound: relay forwards posts from other subscribers to our inbox. Implementation approach: dedicated CLI command (broadside relay add/remove/list) that follows/unfollows relay actors, plus adding relay inboxes to the delivery target list alongside follower inboxes.
